properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Never was a good man It was much deed on the way And I know how it feels To wanna give up on someday

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I might hold the record For the most mistakes made But to a man called Jesus I'm a trophy of grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know I don't deserve All this love that comes my way And He's the one who really knows me Still can't believe that I'm okay

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And you may never find my name In some of the old thing… But He's gat a place to put me Cos I'm His trophy of grace

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now it's just in our nature To wander outside the land Till pain and disappointment It makes it's way into our lives

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But I merit a favor It conquers all I've seen the chance Oh we becomes God's treasures And say things prices turn away…

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I know I don't deserve All this love that comes my way But I need a one who really knows me Still can believes I'm okay

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And you may never find my name In some of old things… But he's gat a place to put me cos I'm his trophy of grace.
